description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Fixed Discord Rich Presence not clearing immediately when disabled
- Fixed cover artwork reverting to the Noctis logo during temporary artwork lookup failures
- Fixed missing or stale Discord Rich Presence artwork after relay reconnections
- Improved Discord Rich Presence reliability during reconnects
- Improved artwork caching behavior to prevent stale artwork from being reused after disconnects
Full Changelog: v1.1.13...v1.1.14
